Name.description: Internal name identifier. Not read by 1.13c engine

Level.description: Level ID this maze configuration applies to. Not read by 1.13c engine

Rooms.description: Number of rooms in the maze. Not read by 1.13c engine

SizeX.description: Width in grid cells. Not read by 1.13c engine

SizeY.description: Height in grid cells. Not read by 1.13c engine

Merge.description: Room merge probability (0-1000). Not read by 1.13c engine

Beta.description: Beta content flag (unused). Not read by 1.13c engine
